Confirmed as valid OpenMRS datatype via GitHub repository openmrs-core (referenced in OpenmrsConstants.java, ConceptServiceTest.java, and standardTestDataset.xml). Datatype class is part of org.openmrs.customdatatype.datatype package.

Confirmed as valid field for OpenMRS attribute types via REST API documentation and comparison with similar tasks (create_location_attribute_type, create_provider_attribute_type). Both use minOccurs/maxOccurs fields in visitattributetype endpoint.
Confirmed as valid field for OpenMRS attribute types via REST API documentation and comparison with similar tasks. Export script extracts maxOccurs from OpenMRS API response.

privileged_info_summary: The create_visit_attribute_type task specifies metadata for creating a new Visit Attribute Type in OpenMRS/Bahmni with name 'Arrival Method', description 'Method of transport to the facility', datatype org.openmrs.customdatatype.datatype.FreeTextDatatype, minOccurs 0, and maxOccurs 1. All metadata values are correctly specified in the task definition and correspond to valid OpenMRS API fields and datatype classes. The task operates on a synthetic Bahmni environment with test patient and visit data, and the objective is to create new metadata definitions rather than manipulate existing real data.
